steps.action: Frevo is a dance and musical style originating f with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: Frevo is a dance and musical style originating f with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: It is said that the sound of the frevo will make
steps.text: It is said that the sound of the frevo will make listeners and dancers feel as if they are boiling on the ground.

steps.action: The word frevo is used for both the frevo music
steps.text: The word frevo is used for both the frevo music and the frevo dance.

steps.action: Since the Carnival is originally linked to Catho
steps.text: Since the Carnival is originally linked to Catholicism, they played religious procession marches and martial music, as well.

steps.action: The latter reacted in a clever way by carrying u
steps.text: The latter reacted in a clever way by carrying umbrellas instead of knives and also disguising the capoeira movements as dance movements.

steps.action: Thus the dances evolved into what would be a uni
steps.text: Thus the dances evolved into what would be a unique form of dance - the frevo dance.

steps.action: Each dancer worked hard in order to develop a ne
steps.text: Each dancer worked hard in order to develop a new movement which required much rehearsal, strength, endurance, and flexibility and the fight between the groups moved from the physical to the aesthetical field.

steps.action: Frevo dance movements include jumps, coordinated
steps.text: Frevo dance movements include jumps, coordinated fast leg movements, leg flexions, tumbling, etc.

steps.action: Frevo dance is now known as passo and Frevo danc
steps.text: Frevo dance is now known as passo and Frevo dancers as passistas.

steps.action: Umbrella movements are part of the dance and doi
steps.text: Umbrella movements are part of the dance and doing acrobatics with them is a common practice.

steps.action: It's said that he added more than 100 different
steps.text: It's said that he added more than 100 different movements to the dance since then.

steps.action: American pop-star Cyndi Lauper is dancing the fr
steps.text: American pop-star Cyndi Lauper is dancing the frevo when she sings her song "Maybe He'll Know".

steps.action: It is frequently perceived by American ears as r
steps.text: It is frequently perceived by American ears as resembling polka.

steps.action: Claudionor Germano (singer) and Antonio Nóbrega
steps.text: Claudionor Germano (singer) and Antonio Nóbrega (singer and dancer) are two of Frevo de Bloco greatest performers.

steps.action: The word frevo is said to come from frever, a va
steps.text: The word frevo is said to come from frever, a variant of the Portuguese word ferver (to boil).

steps.action: By the end of the 19th century, bands from the B
steps.text: By the end of the 19th century, bands from the Brazilian Army regiments based in the city of Recife started a tradition of parading during the Carnival.

steps.action: The two most famous bands were the Espanha (mean
steps.text: The two most famous bands were the Espanha (meaning Spain), whose conductor was of Spanish origin, and the 14, from the 14th Infantry Regiment.

steps.action: The bands started to compete with each other and
steps.text: The bands started to compete with each other and also started playing faster and faster, louder and louder.

steps.action: In order to end the violence, the police started
steps.text: In order to end the violence, the police started to pursue the capoeiras and arrested many during their exhibitions.

steps.action: The clothes of the passistas also developed from
steps.text: The clothes of the passistas also developed from regular clothing to a skimpy attire that is more appropriate for the movements.

steps.action: They are also very colorful, so they can be more
steps.text: They are also very colorful, so they can be more visible in the crowd.

steps.action: The umbrella also developed from regular black u
steps.text: The umbrella also developed from regular black umbrellas with wooden handles to a small and also colorful umbrella.

steps.action: It's not uncommon to see passistas throwing umbr
steps.text: It's not uncommon to see passistas throwing umbrellas in the air, do some movement, and catch them again.

steps.action: They also pass the umbrellas between their legs.
steps.text: They also pass the umbrellas between their legs.
